title: Adobe adds AI assistant to Photoshop, upgrades Firefly with new generative tools
summary: Adobe is launching a beta AI assistant for Photoshop on web and mobile, allowing paid users unlimited generations until April 9. The assistant simplifies editing tasks through voice or text commands, while Firefly Image Editor receives updates for improved image manipulation.

title: Google turns Chrome into an AI browser with Gemini support in India — top features, how to use and more
summary: Google is enhancing Chrome with Gemini AI integration. The feature is now available to users in India, Canada, and New Zealand. The AI can be used to summarize content, draft emails, and edit images.&nbsp;

title: Xiaomi 17, Xiaomi 17 Ultra with LEICA camera setup launched in India: Price, specs, launch offers and more
summary: Xiaomi launched the 17 series in India, featuring LTPO 120Hz displays, Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 processors, and LEICA camera setup. The Xiaomi 17 starts at ₹89,999, while the Ultra model begins at ₹1,39,999

title: Instagram down? Thousands report issues accessing social media platform, frustrated netizens say ‘whole thing is broken’
summary: Instagram is experiencing access issues, with over 10,000 user reports on Downdetector. The peak of complaints occurred around 8:59 AM India time.

title: Incentives, value addition boost made-in-India laptops
summary: Driven by government incentives, Made in India laptops now account for nearly 30% of domestic sales, up from less than 5% in 2024. Local manufacturers like Dixon and Syrma SGS are aggressively scaling capacity to offset a slowdown in the smartphone sector.

title: Michael Burry claims Nvidia used ‘mafia-like’ tactics to block AMD in Oracle data center deal, calls for antitrust probe
summary: Despite cancelling the planned 600-MW expansion at the Abilene site, Oracle and OpenAI’s broader plan to build 4.5 gigawatts of AI data centre capacity remains on track.

title: iPhone Fold leaks: Expected price, release date, specifications and more
summary: Apple's upcoming foldable iPhone, likely called iPhone Ultra, is likely to launch later this year. The phone could feature a dual rear camera setup and four cameras in total.&nbsp;

title: Russia-backed hackers target Signal and WhatsApp accounts: How the attack works, how to stay safe and more
summary: Dutch intelligence agencies warned of a global cyber campaign by Russian-backed hackers targeting Signal and WhatsApp accounts of officials and journalists. Hackers are using phishing techniques to gain access to the accounts, urging victims to provide SMS codes or PINs.

title: Xiaomi Pad 8 with Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 processor, 9,200mAh battery launched in India: Price, specs and more
summary: Xiaomi has launched the Pad 8 tablet in India, featuring a Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 processor, a 9200mAh battery, and a 144Hz LCD display. The tablet starts at a price of ₹33,999 in India.

title: iPhone 18 Pro, iPhone 18 Pro Max launching this year: Expected price, specs and more
summary: Apple's upcoming iPhone 18 Pro and Pro Max are expected to retain similar display sizes while featuring under-display Face ID and a new unified design. Here's everything to expect from the new devices

title: Google completes $32-billion acquisition of cloud security startup Wiz
summary: Google announced the all-cash deal in 2025, as it seeks to strengthen its cloud computing business in the AI era. It is the largest ever transaction sought by Google or its parent Alphabet. As part of the deal, Wiz will operate as a distinct product line within Google Cloud and retain its brand, whi

title: Revolut gets full UK banking licence after years-long wait
summary: Revolut has received regulatory approval to launch a British bank, allowing it to compete head-to-head with high street lenders in areas such as current accounts and consumer lending. Revolut ​said in a statement on Wednesday that the Bank of England's Prudential Regulation Authority had allowed it

title: AI-controlled toys serious threat for safety of children, action being taken: Union minister Ashwini Vaishnaw
summary: During the Question Hour in the Lok Sabha, the minister said that the government has made provisions under the Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023 to ensure children's safety.

title: Synopsys rolls out new software tools for designing AI chips
summary: Synopsys on Wednesday rolled out new ​software tools to handle ​the fast-increasing complexity of designing artificial intelligence chips, ​the first wave of new offerings after its $35 billion buyout of engineering software firm Ansys.

title: Bring food from home, Infosys advises Pune employees as LPG crisis burns its kitchen
summary: Infosys on Wednesday announced that the food courts at its campuses in Pune, Bengaluru and Chennai may be able to offer only a limited menu, underscoring the gravity of the situation arising out of non-availability of commercial LPG to hotel industry.

title: Infosys tightens overseas travel approvals amid Middle East crisis
summary: In an internal communication sent to employees on Wednesday and reviewed by ET, the company said only critical travel would be permitted for the time being. Group meetings, events, offsites, conferences and similar gatherings have been restricted until further notice.

title: Skyroot Aerospace bets on ‘space taxi’ model as Vikram-1 launch nears
summary: In the run up to its maiden launch, the startup’s chief executive Pawan Kumar Chandana called it a “space taxi,” as it is a small rocket that places satellites in unique orbits through customised missions rather than rideshare launches on larger rockets.

title: Neobank Fi Money shuts down banking services
summary: The neobanking startup, which is backed by Peak XV Partners and Alpha Wave Capital, was offering banking services in partnership with Kerala-based Federal Bank. The move is part of a business realignment, and customers can continue to operate their savings accounts through Federal Bank’s official ch

title: Spain to deploy tool to track social media hate speech
summary: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez on Wednesday announced the creation of a tool to track hate speech on social media and hold them accountable, in his latest measure targeting tech giants. The tool "will make it possible to systematically measure the presence, evolution and reach of hate speech o

title: WhatsApp launches parent-managed accounts for pre-teens amid safety concerns
summary: WhatsApp is introducing parent-managed accounts for children under 13. This move comes amid growing global worries about social media's impact on young minds. Parents will control who contacts their children and which groups they join. They can also review message requests and manage privacy setting
